query: SELECT id, name, address, lat, lng FROM establishments WHERE neighborhood = 'Alto de Pinheiros' AND (instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '' OR instagram = 'NULL') ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, address, lat, lng FROM establishments WHERE neighborhood = 'Alto de Pinheiros' AND (instagram IS NULL OR instagram = '' OR instagram = 'NULL') ORDER BY name;
